documentation.text:
@notice Emitted when a proof verification fails
 @param reason Human-readable reason for failure
@notice Returns the verification key commitment (for on-chain auditing)
Tracks spent nullifiers to prevent double-spending of the same RWA collateral.
Stores total approved collateral per address

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256[2] memory,uint256[2] memory[2] memory,uint256[2] memory,uint256[3] memory) view external returns (bool)

documentation.text:
@notice Read the caller's own verified collateral.
 @dev Only the owner (msg.sender) can decrypt this on Sapphire.

IVerifier.metadata: metadata.solc_metadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.20+commit.9f2a5241"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"_attester","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"constructor"},{"anonymous":false,"inputs":[{"indexed":true,"internalType":"address","name":"account","type":"address"},{"indexed":true,"internalType":"address","name":"assetContract","type":"address"},{"indexed":false,"internalType":"uint256","name":"minCollateral","type":"uint256"}],"name":"RWAProofSubmitted","type":"event"},{"inputs":[],"name":"ATTESTER","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"getActiveCollateral","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256[8]","name":"proof","type":"uint256[8]"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"stateRoot","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"nullifierHash","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"minCollateral","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"address","name":"assetContract","type":"address"}],"name":"submitRWAProof","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"verifier","outputs":[{"internalType":"contract Groth16Verifier","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"TRUST MODEL: State variable confidentiality relies on Oasis Sapphire ParaTime.      Deploy ONLY to Sapphire \u2014 on standard EVM chains (Ethereum, Polygon, etc.)      the `nullifiers` mapping could theoretically be analyzed.PROOF SCHEME: Groth16 SNARK proof over BN254.      Public inputs: [stateRoot, minRequiredValue, nullifierHash]","events":{"RWAProofSubmitted(address,address,uint256)":{"params":{"account":"The account depositing the RWA proof.","assetContract":"The source chain tokenized asset contract.","minCollateral":"The verified minimum collateral amount in USD."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"getActiveCollateral()":{"details":"Only the owner (msg.sender) can decrypt this on Sapphire."},"submitRWAProof(uint256[8],uint256,uint256,uint256,address)":{"params":{"assetContract":"The source chain address of the RWA asset.","minCollateral":"The required collateral verified by the ZK range check.","nullifierHash":"Deterministic hash output by the ZK circuit.                       Must be globally unique to prevent double-spending.","proof":"Groth16 proof array [a0, a1, b0, b1, b2, b3, c0, c1]."}}},"title":"RWAOracle","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"RWAProofSubmitted(address,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when an RWA proof is successfully verified."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"getActiveCollateral()":{"notice":"Read the caller's own verified collateral."},"submitRWAProof(uint256[8],uint256,uint256,uint256,address)":{"notice":"Verify a ZK SNARK proof and store the nullifier to prevent replays."}},"notice":"Stores and verifies cross-chain Private RWA Storage Proofs using Oasis Sapphire's TEE.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/RWAOracle.sol":"RWAOracle"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"details":{"constantOptimizer":false,"cse":false,"deduplicate":false,"inliner":false,"jumpdestRemover":false,"orderLiterals":false,"peephole":false,"yul":true,"yulDetails":{"optimizerSteps":"dhfoDgvulfnTUtnIf[xa[r]EscLMcCTUtTOntnfDIulLculVcul [j]Tpeulxa[rul]xa[r]cLgvifCTUca[r]LSsTFOtfDnca[r]Iulc]jmul[jul] VcTOcul jmul:fDnTOc","stackAllocation":true}},"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/RWAOracle.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd2163c3123a75011b417a4728a7ce36611c6c16a88495099c4389131b9251b11","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8b691f1455004db58161dd5219380bfad7348e73ffb959b225892f1dc4e74a33","dweb:/ipfs/QmXNrjN2gMehNzUbuiFfC9srwhDRjFVU4zDWkLMBktctFc"]},"contracts/Verifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0xebfcae8e0b875dd652065c0f654d32396e5ed3f82996f9ff7d86d69616507b85","license":"GPL-3.0","urls":["bzz-raw://9a565801c3fcd503389cd13dc8647bd727db1cfd5b3bd79086704c5f51b3b1fa","dweb:/ipfs/QmUwfEPVVhYzsdYxHsqysKPAQM62GhmgGM5VzJKho17dZk"]}},"version":1}
